race.comment: BUBBLES'N'FROTH (13) hasn't been too far away in all three runs this time in and will be ready to peak now fourth run back. Expect a peak performance now. ASPEN COWBOY (7) gets 2kg off with the claim and maps ideally for this from gate three. Top-three credentials on form from this preparation. ELLIS BEACH (5) resumes here but has placed two from three when fresh and is one from one around this circuit. Worth including despite the sticky draw. WAR COUNCIL (10) gets Wiggins on board and can run a race first-up. THIRD MASTER (15) has been thereabouts of late and may earn some minor money again.
